reviews.review_description: As soon as I join a lobby he pulls out a kick laser  and kicks everyone for no apparent reason. I watched it happen, he appears, kids scream, he pulls out a kick laser and swings it around and I am kicked. Dear “developer” your game has great potential and there’s no glitches as you say, but I feel that it’s run by some very unkindly people. And my review is staying.
